seoTitle: Campbells Forest vs Campbelltown — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Campbells Forest and Campbelltown. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Campbells Forest vs Campbelltown: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Campbells Forest and Campbelltown.
heading: Campbells Forest vs Campbelltown — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Campbells Forest, Victoria and Campbelltown, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Campbells Forest has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Campbelltown (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Campbells Forest or Campbelltown safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Campbells Forest has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Campbelltown scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Campbells Forest scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Campbelltown scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Campbells Forest or Campbelltown?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Campbells Forest has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
